description: run a corpus of known-bad blueprints; assert the checker catches each defect
rules: every case in CORPUS_DIR is known-bad — each MUST be detected
a missed case is a hole in the checker, named in corpus.json
an empty corpus is a failure — there is nothing to prove
usage: Set CORPUS_DIR (a dir of known-bad *.json blueprints). Output: corpus.json with {cases, caught, missed}.
limitation: Detects the structural defect classes composer.structural covers (non-terminal sink, unreachable state, no reachable terminal). The richer >=6-defect workflow corpus (compensation cycle, retry livelock, par mutual-wait) lands with the workflow algebra (plan P4).
